mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `show` (name, description, category, poster_url, venue, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{category}, #{posterUrl}, #{venue}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE `show` SET name = #{name}, description = #{description}, category = #{category}, poster_url = #{posterUrl}, venue = #{venue}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, category, poster_url, venue, status, create_time, update_time FROM `show` ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, name, description, category, poster_url, venue, status, create_time, update_time FROM `show` WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY create_time DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `show`
AND status = #{status} AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{name}, '%') AND category LIKE CONCAT('%', #{category}, '%') AND venue LIKE CONCAT('%', #{venue}, '%')
